jsonLd.title: Sharekhan is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan:
Sharekhan is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
